_comment: Ordered list of versioned-variant regex patterns. Each pattern is tried in order; the first match wins. Patterns extract a (base_family, variant) tuple from a raw family string that contains a version component. All patterns are anchored (full-string match). Named capture groups: 'base' = normalized family, 'variant' = version/variant suffix.

patterns.name: hyphen-version
patterns.description: Matches <base>-<N>(-<N>)* trailing numeric version with hyphens: e.g. 'claude-opus-4-5' where trailing -4-5 is the version. Greedily extracts non-numeric prefix as base.
